model.description: The ID of the embedding model to use for the job.

dataset_id.description: The ID of a dataset of type embed-input. The dataset must have a validation status of Validated.

input_type.description: Specifies the type of input. Required for embedding models v3 and higher. Use search_document for vector database storage, search_query for search queries, classification for classifiers, and clustering for clustering tasks.

truncate.description: Specifies how inputs longer than the maximum token length are handled. START discards the beginning, END discards the end.

embedding_types.description: Specifies the types of embeddings to generate.

name.description: An optional name for the embed job.
